description: Architect child: fetch task details, semantic codebase discovery, read key files, return structured discovery summary

steps.title: Fetch task details
steps.description: Fetch bead details for {{task_id}} via bd show. If the task has a parent epic, fetch parent context too.

steps.title: Semantic codebase discovery
steps.description: Query codebase-retrieval for architectural patterns, key files, and modules relevant to {{task_id}}. Hard gate: must call codebase-retrieval at least once.

steps.title: Read key files
steps.description: Read up to 5 key files identified by semantic retrieval. Hard gate: must call read_file at least once.

steps.title: Return discovery summary
steps.description: Return structured discovery summary for {{task_id}}: task understanding (what/why/type), key components, dependencies/blockers, scope boundaries, runtime attestation.
